description_long: This is an adult female figure dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve blouse tucked into high-waisted pants. She wears a wide-brimmed cowboy hat and a neckerchief, giving her a Western-inspired appearance. Her boots are tall and sturdy, suitable for walking on various urban or rural surfaces. The figure's arms are extended horizontally, and her posture is upright and balanced. The clothing is form-fitting, with subtle creases and realistic proportions, and the face is partially obscured by the hat. The overall look is practical yet stylish, with a clear emphasis on Western or equestrian fashion.
description: An adult woman in Western-style attire, featuring a cowboy hat, neckerchief, blouse, high-waisted pants, and tall boots. The figure stands upright with arms extended.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, hat, neckerchief, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, facial features, and the fitted nature of the blouse and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hat, blouse, pants, and boots, with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the contour of the clothing and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: Western-style blouse, high-waisted fitted pants, neckerchief, and wide-brimmed cowboy hat
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair tied back in a low ponytail
